description: Autonomous performance research loop for Django apps — measures, experiments, keeps or discards

backend.scoring: lower query_count + lower response_time = higher score

safety_gates.logic: AND — both must pass for KEEP

functions.name: measure_backend

returns.query_count: int — total queries across all tested URLs

functions.implementation: Django test client, assert_num_queries, 10 requests per URL

functions.name: measure_frontend
functions.implementation: Playwright launches Chrome, runs Lighthouse CLI, parses JSON output

functions.name: combined_score
functions.signature: combined_score(backend: dict, frontend: dict, weights: tuple = (0.6, 0.4)) -> float

functions.name: run_tests
functions.implementation: subprocess.run pytest, capture output, parse exit code

entry.hypothesis: str — what the agent changed and why

steps: 2. Read current combined_score from log.json (or measure baseline if first run)
3. Propose one hypothesis — a single targeted change
4. Apply the change (edit files in target app only)
5. run_tests() — if fails: DISCARD, git checkout, log entry, go to step 3
7. If combined_score < previous: DISCARD, git checkout, log entry, go to step 3
8. KEEP: git commit with message autoresearch(<app>): iteration N — score X.XX
agent_loop_protocol.termination: user interrupts or max_iterations reached (default: no limit)

test_cases.name: baseline measurement returns valid scores
test_cases.given: A running Django dev server with a target app
test_cases.then: Both return dicts with score in range 0-100

test_cases.name: failing tests trigger DISCARD
test_cases.given: Agent has applied a change that breaks a test
test_cases.then: decision = DISCARD, git checkout is run, no commit is made

test_cases.name: lower combined score triggers DISCARD
test_cases.then: decision = DISCARD, git checkout is run, no commit is made

test_cases.name: equal score does not trigger DISCARD
test_cases.then: decision = KEEP — score must be >= not strictly >

test_cases.name: improved score produces git commit
test_cases.given: Tests pass and combined_score improves from 70 to 75
test_cases.then: Git commit created with message autoresearch(<app>): iteration N — score 75.00

test_cases.name: log.json appended after every iteration
test_cases.given: Any completed iteration — KEEP or DISCARD
test_cases.then: log.json contains one new entry with all required fields

test_cases.name: agent never touches models.py or migrations
test_cases.then: Agent rejects own hypothesis and proposes a different one

test_cases.name: measure_backend handles zero queries gracefully
test_cases.given: A view that makes zero DB queries
test_cases.then: query_count=0 is valid, score=100 for that dimension

test_cases.name: Lighthouse failure does not crash loop
test_cases.given: Dev server is not running when measure_frontend() is called
test_cases.then: Returns score=0 and logs error — loop continues with DISCARD decision
